# Claude Code Documentation Overview

This is the **official documentation for Claude Code**, Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Here's what's covered:

## Core Topics

**Agent SDK & Development**
- [Agent SDK overview](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/overview.md) - Build production AI agents with Claude Code as a library
- [Quickstart guides](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/quickstart.md) - Get started with Python or TypeScript SDK
- [API references](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/python.md) - Complete Python and TypeScript reference docs

**Key Features**
- [How the agent loop works](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/agent-loop.md)
- [Custom tools & MCP integration](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/custom-tools.md)
- [Structured outputs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/structured-outputs.md)
- [Streaming responses](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/streaming-output.md)
- [Subagents](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/subagents.md)

**Deployment & Operations**
- [Hosting the Agent SDK](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/hosting.md)
- [Secure deployment](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/secure-deployment.md)
- [Cost tracking](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/cost-tracking.md)
- [Observability with OpenTelemetry](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/observability.md)

**Available Platforms**
- CLI, Desktop app, VS Code, JetBrains IDEs, Web, Mobile, Browser (Chrome)

Based on the web search results, here's what I found about Claude Code sharing, exporting, and conversation management in 2026:

## Claude Code Conversation Export and Sharing

### Built-in Export Options
Inside any Claude Code session, you can type `/export` to open a dialog to copy to clipboard or save to a file. If you already know the filename, you can use `/export auth-refactor-notes.md` to write the full conversation as plain text directly to disk.

### Sharing Options
There is no built-in sharing link feature. Your options include: exporting to a file with `/export session.md` and sending it, using `/remote-control` to let someone control your session from claude.ai, or copying the file directly from ~/.claude/projects/<project>/ where sessions are stored as .jsonl files per project.

### Third-Party Tools
Several community tools exist to enhance sharing capabilities:

- **claude-code-share**: A command-line tool that makes it easy to share your conversations from Claude Code with others by providing a simple, interactive interface to select a conversation and generates a short, shareable link that you can send to anyone.

- **claude-conversation-extractor**: Claude Code saves all chats in ~/.claude/projects/ as JSONL files, and there's no built-in export feature - that's why this tool exists.

### Other Features
You can rename your sessions with `/rename auth-refactor` or name at launch with `claude -n "payment-webhook-debug"`.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text:
## Claude Code Conversation Sharing & Export Options

Claude Code doesn't have a built-in feature to generate shareable links, but here are your available options:

### Built-in Export Commands

**`/export`** - Opens a dialog to copy or save your conversation to a file
- Type `/export` alone to choose how to export
- Use `/export filename.md` to save directly to disk with a specific name
- Example: `/export conversation-log.md`

### Manual Sharing Methods

1. **Export as Markdown** - Use `/export` to save conversations as readable text files you can email or share
2. **Remote Control** - Use `/remote-control` to let someone control your session directly from claude.ai
3. **Direct File Access** - Conversations are stored as `.jsonl` files in `~/.claude/projects/<project-name>/` — you can copy and share these raw files directly

### Naming & Organization

- **`/rename`** - Rename sessions for easier tracking: `/rename auth-refactor`
- **Launch with name** - Start a new session with a name: `claude -n "payment-webhook-debug"`

### Community Tools

If you need more advanced sharing, community-developed tools are available:

- **[claude-code-share](https://github.com/wsxiaoys/claude-code-share)** - Generate shareable links from conversations
- **[claude-conversation-extractor](https://github.com/ZeroSumQuant/claude-conversation-extractor)** - Extract conversations from Claude Code's internal storage
- **[claude-chat-exporter](https://github.com/agarwalvishal/claude-chat-exporter)** - Export conversations to formatted Markdown

---

**Sources:**
- [How to export, save, and share a Claude Code conversation](https://kentgigger.com/posts/claude-code-export-save-conversation)
- [Sharing and Unsharing Chats | Claude Help Center](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/10593882-sharing-and-unsharing-chats)
- [claude-code-share - GitHub](https://github.com/wsxiaoys/claude-code-share)
- [claude-conversation-extractor - GitHub](https://github.com/ZeroSumQuant/claude-conversation-extractor)
